title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 23 2026
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 23 2026
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 23 2026
summary:
Main
Today, DCE iron ore futures opened weak in the morning session and saw a modest recovery in the afternoon,with the most-traded I2609 contract closing at 738.5 yuan/mt, down 0.54% from the previous trading session. Port spot prices held steady from the previous day. Traders mostly followed market trends, with moderate quoting enthusiasm.
